display_name_sources: source_facts.name is tta; official SourceForge project/homepage identifies it as the TTA lossless audio codec.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official SourceForge project page; Tau Software official site is an official documentation/homepage surface for True Audio TTA.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; the official SourceForge project exposes its source control under the project Code area.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies TTA as a lossless audio codec and source_facts.executables lists the tta command.
